prompt: Convert Splunk SPL brute-force correlation search to KQL for Sentinel

assertions.text: Output includes standard .kql comment header block
Uses Syslog table for Linux authentication logs
Maps Splunk dc() to KQL dcount()
Maps Splunk values() to KQL make_set()
Uses join to correlate failed logins with successful logins by user
Uses iff() or case() instead of Splunk eval/if syntax
